interaction_phrase: Oqtant is an exciting new tool for your classroom
occurrence_sentence: If you're training the next generation of quantum researchers, Oqtant is an exciting new tool for your classroom.
The [web application](https://oqtant.infleqtion.com/) enables the creation and manipulation of quantum matter using a simple no-code interface.
